description: run a seeded discrete-event queue simulation and report wait/service/throughput stats
rules: single shared Resource of capacity NUM_RESOURCES; exponential arrivals, Gaussian service
usage: Set SIM_TIME, NUM_RESOURCES, ARRIVAL_RATE, SERVICE_TIME_MEAN, RANDOM_SEED. Output: sim_stats.txt.
limitation: Requires the simpy package at run time; when absent the porter writes a placeholder and exits 0. Models one M/M/c-style queue only — not arbitrary topologies.
